home.welcome_subtitle: How can I help you today?
home.search_placeholder: Search for a medicine or active ingredient
home.quick_actions_subtitle: Search by name or identify a medicine from its box photo.
home.simple_home_subtitle: Access search, scan, and reminders from one screen.
home.action_reminder_subtitle: Track dose times and stock information.
home.action_emergency_card_subtitle: Store blood type, allergies, and emergency contacts.
home.action_ai_chat_subtitle: Ask questions about medicines, symptoms, and health.
home.action_symptom_analysis_subtitle: Describe your symptoms, our AI will evaluate possible causes.
home.on_duty_coming: On-duty pharmacy feature coming soon. It will show the nearest pharmacies based on your location.
home.health_tip_content: Take your medicines at the same time each day. Consistent use improves treatment effectiveness.
home.search_action_subtitle: Quickly find medicine info, active ingredients, and warnings.
home.scan_action_subtitle: Analyze a box, blister, or label photo to identify the medicine.
home.safety_note_content: All medicine information is provided with AI assistance. Always consult your pharmacist or doctor for definitive diagnosis and treatment.
home.scan_medicine_subtitle: Automatically identify a medicine from box or blister photos.
home.scan_prospectus_subtitle: Extract a readable summary from a leaflet image.
home.scan_all_in_one_subtitle: Upload a medicine box or leaflet in the same flow; just select the mode and continue.
home.scan_tip_1: Take the photo in a well-lit environment.
home.scan_tip_2: Make sure the medicine name and info are in frame.
home.scan_tip_3: Photograph one medicine at a time.
home.phase1_subtitle: In addition to text search, we are progressively enabling medicine recognition from photos. This screen consolidates search and profile operations.

auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.create_account_subtitle: Create a new account to get started.
auth.name: Full Name
auth.forgot_password_subtitle:
Enter your email address to receive
a password reset link.
auth.reset_link_sent: Password reset link has been sent to your email.

drug_search.title: Search Medicine
drug_search.error: Could not retrieve medicine info. Please try again.
drug_search.network_error: Could not reach the server. Check your internet connection and try again.
drug_search.rate_limit_error: You searched too frequently. Wait a moment and try again.
drug_search.timeout_error: Request timed out. Please try again.
drug_search.empty_hint: You can get info by typing a medicine name
drug_search.empty_subtitle: Type at least 3 characters in the search box to quickly access medicine information.
drug_search.empty_with_recent_subtitle: You can continue from one of your recent searches.
drug_search.min_length_subtitle: Enter at least 3 characters for auto-search or press the search button.
drug_search.text_search_page_subtitle: Get quick info by typing the medicine name.
drug_search.image_card_subtitle: Select a box, blister, or label photo; let AI extract the medicine info.
drug_search.photo_screen_subtitle: Upload a pharmacy box, blister, or medicine label image. The system will detect the medicine and extract summary info.
drug_search.prospectus_mode_subtitle: Upload a leaflet, box back, or instructions image. The system will summarize readable sections and extract key headings.
drug_search.scan_mode_subtitle: Use the same photo flow for medicine recognition or leaflet summarization.
drug_search.photo_tip_1: Take the photo on a flat surface with good lighting.
drug_search.photo_tip_2: Make sure the medicine name and dosage are fully in frame.
drug_search.photo_tip_3: Include only one medicine per photo if possible.
drug_search.image_empty_subtitle: You can take a new photo with the camera or select an existing image from the gallery.
drug_search.prospectus_card_subtitle: Select a leaflet, box back, or instructions image; let the system summarize key sections as headings.
drug_search.image_ready: Image ready, you can now analyze it.
drug_search.image_select_first: First select an image to analyze.
drug_search.image_permission_error: Camera or photo access permission was not granted.
drug_search.image_empty_error: The selected image could not be read. Please try another image.
drug_search.image_invalid_error: Only image files can be analyzed.
drug_search.image_analysis_error: Image could not be analyzed. Please try again.
drug_search.camera_screen_subtitle: Make sure the medicine name or leaflet heading is clearly visible in the frame, then press the capture button.
drug_search.camera_unavailable: No available camera found on this device.
drug_search.camera_capture_error: An issue occurred while taking the photo. Please try again.
drug_search.candidates_subtitle: Multiple possible medicines were detected in the image. You can open the closest match or try the other candidates below.
drug_search.candidate_alternatives_subtitle: Tap the list to retrieve detailed medicine info for that candidate.
drug_search.candidate_tile_subtitle: Open this candidate for detailed medicine info.
drug_search.flow_step_select_subtitle: Capture with camera or upload from gallery.
drug_search.flow_step_analyze_medicine_subtitle: Extract medicine name, dose, and basic info.
drug_search.flow_step_analyze_prospectus_subtitle: Generate a readable summary under headings.
drug_search.analysis_hint_medicine: Medicine recognition depends on image quality; multiple candidates may be shown when uncertain.
drug_search.analysis_hint_prospectus: Summary is generated based on image readability; the system won't guess unclear areas.
drug_search.voice_unavailable: Voice search is not available on this device.

drug_detail.title: Medicine Info
drug_detail.disclaimer: This information is for general informational purposes only. It is not medical advice.
drug_detail.ai_badge: This content was analyzed by AI
drug_detail.quick_actions_subtitle: Start the most common operations without leaving the detail view.
drug_detail.natural_support_subtitle: Not a replacement for medicine; these are options that may be considered as complementary support.
drug_detail.natural_support_fallback: Natural support suggestions could not be retrieved. Try again later if needed.

drug_search_history.title: Search History
drug_search_history.empty_subtitle: Your history will appear here as you search for medicines.

drug_scan_history.title: Scan History
drug_scan_history.empty_subtitle: Medicines and leaflet summaries analyzed by photo will appear here.

drug_interaction.title: Medicine Interaction Check
drug_interaction.hero_subtitle: Currently {} medicines selected. Add at least two to analyze possible interactions.
drug_interaction.selected_subtitle: Select from your history or add a new medicine manually.
drug_interaction.empty_selection: You haven't selected any medicines for interaction analysis yet.
drug_interaction.min_two_drugs: At least two medicines are required for interaction analysis.
drug_interaction.generic_error: Interaction analysis could not complete at this time. Please try again.
drug_interaction.suggestions_subtitle: You can add medicines from your recent searches and scans.
drug_interaction.suggestions_empty: Search or scan a few medicines first to see suggestions.
drug_interaction.no_summary: General summary could not be generated.
drug_interaction.no_interaction_items: No significant interaction found; still consult your doctor or pharmacist before combined use.
drug_interaction.hero_subtitle_ready: Ready! {} drugs selected — tap the button below to check interactions.

drug_natural_alternatives.title: Natural Alternatives
drug_natural_alternatives.input_title: Discover natural supports for a medicine
drug_natural_alternatives.input_subtitle: These suggestions are not replacements for medicine; they offer complementary options only.
drug_natural_alternatives.empty_error: Enter a medicine name to see natural alternatives.
drug_natural_alternatives.generic_error: Natural alternative suggestions could not be retrieved at this time.
drug_natural_alternatives.empty_result: No significant natural support suggestion found for this medicine.

medication_reminder.title: Medicine Reminders
medication_reminder.hero_subtitle: Total {} records, {} active reminders and {} low stock warnings.
medication_reminder.list_subtitle: Manage time, dose, and remaining stock on one screen.
medication_reminder.editor_subtitle: Save the medicine name, time, and stock info to simplify daily tracking.
medication_reminder.status_switch_subtitle: If turned off, the record remains but tracking is paused.
medication_reminder.notes_hint: e.g. With food, after morning breakfast
medication_reminder.validation_drug_name: Enter a medicine name to add a reminder.
medication_reminder.notifications_disabled: Enable device notification permission for offline reminders to work.
medication_reminder.empty_subtitle: Start time and stock tracking for medicines you take regularly.
medication_reminder.delete_confirm_body: {} reminder will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
medication_reminder.alarm_switch_subtitle: Rings even when the phone is on silent and shows a screen notification

family.title: Family Profile
family.empty_subtitle: Track your family members' medicines from one place.
family.delete_confirm_message: Member {} and all medicine records will be deleted.
family.no_drugs_subtitle: Track this family member's medicines from here.
family.interaction_disclaimer: This analysis is for general informational purposes. Consult your doctor or pharmacist.

pharmacy.title: On-Duty Pharmacy
pharmacy.initial_subtitle: Share your location and we will list the nearest on-duty pharmacies.
pharmacy.loading_subtitle: Getting your location and listing nearby on-duty pharmacies.
pharmacy.empty_subtitle: No active on-duty pharmacy nearby. Search in a wider area.
pharmacy.error_subtitle: On-duty pharmacy information cannot be loaded at this time.
pharmacy.location_permission_denied: Location permission denied. Location permission is needed to find on-duty pharmacies.
pharmacy.location_unavailable: Location info could not be retrieved. Please try again.
pharmacy.location_denied_forever_body: Location permission has been permanently denied. To find on-duty pharmacies, please enable location permission in app settings.
pharmacy.location_error: Could not get location. Please try again.
pharmacy.no_results_subtitle: No on-duty pharmacy found in this area. Check the province/district and try again.
pharmacy.error_generic: Could not retrieve pharmacy info. Please try again.
pharmacy.fallback_notice: No on-duty pharmacy found in {}; showing results for the whole province.

emergency_card.title: My Emergency Card
emergency_card.empty_title: Your Emergency Card Is Not Ready
emergency_card.empty_subtitle: Fill in information that will help in emergencies.
emergency_card.qr_subtitle: Let emergency personnel scan this code to instantly access your information.

health_notes.title: My Health Notes
health_notes.empty_subtitle: Start recording your daily health status.
health_notes.empty_filtered_subtitle: No records found for this category.
health_notes.delete_confirm_message: This note will be permanently deleted.
health_notes.report_last7_empty: No notes in the last 7 days.
health_notes.report_no_notes: At least one note is required to generate a report.
health_notes.medication_taken_subtitle: Did you take your medication today?
health_notes.report_trend_empty: No measurement data for this category.
health_notes.doctor_view_subtitle: You can show this report to your doctor.

onboarding.onboarding_subtitle_1: Get detailed medicine information in seconds by typing the name or taking a box photo.
onboarding.onboarding_subtitle_2: Track medicines, doses, and reminders for all family members in one place.
onboarding.onboarding_subtitle_3: Store blood type, allergies, and emergency contacts; find on-duty pharmacies instantly.

errors.network_timeout: Connection timed out. Please check your internet connection and try again.
errors.no_connection: No internet connection. Please check your connection.
errors.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.server_error: A server error occurred. Please try again later.

account_settings.title: Account Settings
account_settings.password_changed: Your password has been updated successfully.
account_settings.logout_confirm_message: Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?
account_settings.password_min_length: Password must be at least 6 characters.

ai_chat.title: Pharmacist Assistant
ai_chat.powered_by: AI Powered · For general information only
ai_chat.empty_subtitle: Ask anything about medicines, side effects, dosage, or symptoms.
ai_chat.example_2: Is it better to take medicine on a full stomach?
ai_chat.example_3: What should I watch out for when taking antibiotics?
ai_chat.error: Could not get a response. Please try again.
ai_chat.disclaimer: This information is for general informational purposes only. It does not constitute medical advice.

symptom_analysis.title: Symptom Analysis
symptom_analysis.input_subtitle: Describe what you're experiencing; possible causes and recommendations will be evaluated.
symptom_analysis.input_hint: E.g. Headache, fever, and sore throat for the past two days...
symptom_analysis.empty_error: Please enter a description of your symptoms.
symptom_analysis.generic_error: Symptom analysis could not be completed. Please try again.
symptom_analysis.emergency_subtitle: Your symptoms may require urgent medical attention. Call 112 immediately.
symptom_analysis.doctor_when_title: When Should You See a Doctor?
symptom_analysis.disclaimer: This is not a medical diagnosis. Consult a doctor or pharmacist for a definitive assessment.
